description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 15, 2026 at 11:31 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Venice, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Horizon Avenue near Main Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwestbound on Horizon Avenue when it slowed to a stop to yield to a utility vehicle parked in-lane 
facing southwest at the north curb. The Waymo AV momentarily began to proceed forward and to the left to pass the parked utility vehicle, 
and then came to a stop to yield to the utility vehicle and an SUV that was initially parked on Horizon Avenue facing southwest on the south 
curb. While the Waymo AV was stopped, the SUV reversed and maneuvered to the right, and the rear left side of the SUV made contact 
with the front left side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged. Both vehicles 
sustained damage. The driver of the SUV alleged minor injuries.
Print
Clear Form
